nodes.name: 金喉红顶蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 金喉红顶蜂鸟（Ruby-topaz hummingbird，学名 Chrysolampis mosquitus），分类上属于雨燕目，并归入蜂鸟科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。
nodes.shortSummary: 金喉红顶蜂鸟（学名：Chrysolampis mosquitus），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类，是红顶蜂鸟属（学名：Chrysolampis）的唯一一种。 金喉红顶蜂鸟体重约3.9克，翼长约53.9毫米，嘴峰长约20.3毫米，喙宽度约1.8毫米，喙厚度约1.7毫米，跗蹠长约3.6…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Colombia its range extends southward between the three Andes ranges, and it is also found in the ABC Islands and Trinidad and Tobago. It has been recorded as a vagrant in Argentina and Peru and there is at least one unconfirmed sight record in Paraguay. The ruby-topaz hummingbird inhabits the interior and edges of open savanna-like landscapes and shrubby arid hillsides; it is found in gardens and cultivated areas as well
